description: 10 valid Sortino values, no sentinels. Filter is a no-op. Backward-compat test: DSR with filter == DSR without filter.

dsr_scenario.derivation: autotuner.compute_deflated_sharpe_ratio(SR_obs=1.5, SR_0=1.36773, gamma3=0.44803, gamma4=2.2, T=60) = 1.014489036. Identical before and after filter (no-op).

derivation.note: Same valid_sortinos as fixture 01 but without the 5 sentinels appended. Moments are identical to valid_only_moments in fixture 01.
